title: Standardized immunohistochemical staining used in the Human Protein Atlas
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"712qt","text":"All IHC staining in the Human Protein Atlas project are performed using the following standard protocol. The primary antibody dilution is based on titration optimization, the dilution suggested by the Human Protein Atlas can be found under antibody and antigen information for each antibody.  When primary antibody originates from other host animals than rabbit, there are some modifications and different secondary antibody is used.

steps: Dry paraffin sections at room temperature overnight.
Bake the paraffin sections from 12:00:00 to 24:00:00 at 50 °C .
Deparaffinization and hydration are done in xylene and graded ethanol to distilled water.
During hydration step, block endogeneous peroxidase during 00:05:00 in H202 .3 % volume in 95% ethanol.
Heat the slides immersed in retrieval buffer for 00:04:00 at 125 °C in a pressure boiler.
After completed boiling, leave the slides in the pressure boiler and let them cool down till 90 °C . Total time 00:45:00

Place slides in the Autostainer 480, all the incubations are done at room temperature. Autostainer 480 (ThermoFisher Scientific, cat# A80500007, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/A80500008 )
Rinse slides in wash buffer.
Incubate slides with Ultra V Block for 00:05:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #10 .
Incubate slides with primary antibody diluted in antibody diluent for 00:30:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #12 .
Incubate slides with labeled HRP polymer for 00:30:00 .
Rinse slides in wash buffer go to step #14 .
Incubate slides with DAB solution for 00:05:00 .
Rinse slides in distilled water.

Transfer slides in the Autostainer XL. Autostainer XL (Leica biosystems, cat# Leica ST5010 Autostainer XL, https://www.leicabiosystems.com/histology-equipment/he-stainers-special-stainers-coverslippers/products/leica-st5010/ )
Counterstain slides with hematoxylin for 00:07:50 .
Rinse slides in lithium carbonate water diluted 1:5 from saturated solution for 00:01:00 .
Rinse slides in tap water for 00:05:00 .
Dehydrate slides in graded ethanol and Neo-Clear.
Mount coverslip in each of the slide.
creator: Anna Martinez Casals
